description: Weekly Signal Brief cover email — delivers the Frontier Dispatch or Echoes weekly report.
subject: Your Weekly Signal Brief — {{week_range}}

local_champion.avatar_headline: This week's market moves that affect booked jobs in your area.
local_champion.avatar_action: One thing to try this week: text the lead response scorecard link to the last 10 prospects who didn't book.

solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_headline: Three leverage signals the consulting market is sending this week.
solo_strategic_consultant.avatar_action: Operator move of the week: audit your last 5 engagements for repeatable components — one of them wants to be a product.

boutique_agency_founder.avatar_headline: Margin signals from the agency market — what's moving this week.
boutique_agency_founder.avatar_action: Margin lever of the week: run the Utilization Delta — compare billed vs. booked hours per PM.

fractional_executive.avatar_headline: Portfolio signals from the fractional market.
fractional_executive.avatar_action: Context move of the week: archive one client context vault that's gone stale and free the cognitive load.

technical_founder_operator.avatar_headline: Sovereign stack signals from the indie operator market.
technical_founder_operator.avatar_action: Build move of the week: one integration you can replace with a sovereign primitive.

solo_operator.avatar_headline: Solo operator signals — what's working for people building alone.
solo_operator.avatar_action: One template to grab from the pack this week.

agency_builder.avatar_headline: Scaling signals from agencies crossing $1M and $3M.
agency_builder.avatar_action: Playbook rollout move of the week.

creative_hustler.avatar_headline: Creator resonance signals — what's breaking through this week.
